requirement_topic.en: Children's Sleepwear — Canada Consumer Product Safety Act / SOR/2016-169
requirement_topic.zh: 儿童睡衣——《加拿大消费品安全法》/ SOR/2016-169
requirement_topic.zht: 兒童睡衣——《加拿大消費品安全法》/ SOR/2016-169

summary.en: Children's sleepwear is subject to the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act and the Children's Sleepwear Regulations, SOR/2016-169. The regulation sets mandatory flame-resistance specifications, test procedures, toxicity considerations for flame-retardant treatment, and labelling requirements for covered children's sleepwear. The rule is product-specific and stricter than general apparel screening because sleepwear presents foreseeable ignition and burn risks. Product classification is critical: garments marketed or reasonably likely to be used as children's sleepwear should be assessed under SOR/2016-169 even if sold as loungewear or sets.
summary.zh: 儿童睡衣受《加拿大消费品安全法》和《儿童睡衣条例》SOR/2016-169约束。该条例对覆盖范围内儿童睡衣设定强制阻燃规格、测试程序、阻燃处理毒性考虑及标签要求。该规则为具体产品规则，因睡衣存在可预见的引燃和烧伤风险，要求严于一般服装筛查。产品分类至关重要：作为儿童睡衣营销或合理可能被用作儿童睡衣的服装，即使以家居服或套装销售，也应按SOR/2016-169评估。
summary.zht: 兒童睡衣受《加拿大消費品安全法》和《兒童睡衣條例》SOR/2016-169約束。該條例對覆蓋範圍內兒童睡衣設定強制阻燃規格、測試程序、阻燃處理毒性考慮及標籤要求。該規則為具體產品規則，因睡衣存在可預見的引燃和燒傷風險，要求嚴於一般服裝篩查。產品分類至關重要：作為兒童睡衣營銷或合理可能被用作兒童睡衣的服裝，即使以家居服或套裝銷售，也應按SOR/2016-169評估。

standards_or_laws: Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, S.C. 2010, c. 21

summary.en: China's GB 31701-2015 is mandatory for infant and children's textile products and includes chemical, mechanical, and labelling controls. It does not replace Canada's children's sleepwear flame-resistance regulation. Chinese category labels such as infant textile Class A, direct-skin Class B, or non-direct-skin Class C do not determine whether a product is Canadian children's sleepwear. Separate Canadian classification and testing are needed.
summary.zh: 中国GB 31701-2015为婴幼儿及儿童纺织产品强制标准，包含化学、机械和标签控制。但它不能替代加拿大儿童睡衣阻燃条例。中国标签中的婴幼儿纺织品A类、直接接触皮肤B类或非直接接触皮肤C类，并不能决定产品是否属于加拿大儿童睡衣。仍需进行单独的加拿大分类和测试。
summary.zht: 中國GB 31701-2015為嬰幼兒及兒童紡織產品強制標準，包含化學、機械和標籤控制。但它不能替代加拿大兒童睡衣阻燃條例。中國標籤中的嬰幼兒紡織品A類、直接接觸皮膚B類或非直接接觸皮膚C類，並不能決定產品是否屬於加拿大兒童睡衣。仍需進行單獨的加拿大分類和測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 31701-2015 — Safety Technical Code for Textile Products for Infants and Young Children (mandatory)
GB 18401-2010 — National General Safety Technical Code for Textile Products (mandatory)

gap.en: China-origin children's sleepwear often fails documentation review because the supplier provides only GB 31701 or GB 18401 reports and no Canada-specific sleepwear burn testing. Fit, garment style, packaging words, online listing copy, and intended age can affect Canadian classification. Tight-fitting and loose-fitting garments may be treated differently under the Canadian framework, so pattern and size files should be reviewed before production. Flame-retardant chemistry, if used, must also be reviewed for toxicity and durability, not just initial burn performance.
gap.zh: 中国原产儿童睡衣常见文件缺口是供应商只提供GB 31701或GB 18401报告，而没有加拿大专用睡衣燃烧测试。版型、服装款式、包装文字、线上商品文案和目标年龄都可能影响加拿大分类。紧身和宽松服装在加拿大框架下可能被区别处理，因此应在生产前审查纸样和尺码文件。如使用阻燃化学品，还必须审查毒性和耐久性，而不仅是初始燃烧性能。
gap.zht: 中國原產兒童睡衣常見文件缺口是供應商只提供GB 31701或GB 18401報告，而沒有加拿大專用睡衣燃燒測試。版型、服裝款式、包裝文字、線上商品文案和目標年齡都可能影響加拿大分類。緊身和寬鬆服裝在加拿大框架下可能被區別處理，因此應在生產前審查紙樣和尺碼文件。如使用阻燃化學品，還必須審查毒性和耐久性，而不僅是初始燃燒性能。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Children's Sleepwear Regulations SOR/2016-169 are legally binding for covered children's sleepwear under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 31701-2015 applies to infant and children's textile products sold in China, but it is not equivalent to Canada's children's sleepwear regulation

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website / Government of Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Children's sleepwear for Canada needs Canada-specific classification, flame-resistance evidence, and labelling review under SOR/2016-169. Passing GB 31701 is useful background but does not establish Canadian compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】出口加拿大的儿童睡衣需要按SOR/2016-169进行加拿大专属分类、阻燃证据和标签审查。通过GB 31701可作为背景资料，但不能证明符合加拿大要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】出口加拿大的兒童睡衣需要按SOR/2016-169進行加拿大專屬分類、阻燃證據和標籤審查。通過GB 31701可作為背景資料，但不能證明符合加拿大要求。
